tools.name: get_curated_registry
tools.description: Get the curated registry of known agentskills.io skill repositories. Use first to discover available skill sources.

tools.name: search_skills
tools.description: Search across all of GitHub for Agent Skills (SKILL.md files) by keyword. Returns matching skill files with context fragments.

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List all skills in a repository at a given path. Returns skill names for progressive discovery.

tools.name: get_skill
tools.description: Load the full SKILL.md content for a specific skill. Returns complete instructions including workflows, code examples, and validation checklists.

tools.name: execute_in_sandbox
tools.description: Execute shell commands in an isolated ACA Sandbox. Creates a fresh sandbox, runs commands sequentially, and returns stdout/stderr.

tools.name: get_sandbox_status
tools.description: Check the status of an active sandbox and see its command history.

tools.name: delete_sandbox
tools.description: Delete a sandbox immediately to free resources.

tools.name: read_sandbox_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from a sandbox. Use after executing commands to inspect generated code or output.

tools.name: list_sandbox_files
tools.description: List files and directories in a sandbox path. Use to explore what was created by skill execution.

tools.name: apply_skill
tools.description: One-shot: fetch a skill from GitHub, extract executable commands, and run them in a fresh sandbox. Returns guidance + execution results.
